summary: Tested 3 new features for Mesa POS: 1) Movement search in Cash Register, 2) Floating reprint button on movement selection, 3) Copies field in printer settings. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Movement search field visible in CashRegister with placeholder 'Buscar por NCF, monto, descripción...'
Movement search filters by NCF pattern (B01), amount, description
Clicking movement shows selected state (orange ring/highlight)
Floating reprint button appears at bottom when movement selected
Reprint button shows: movement description, amount, reference, 'Re-imprimir' button
Reprint button hides when movement deselected
B04 button visible in header for admin user
Printer Settings shows 'Copias' field for each channel (Cocina, BAR, RECIBO, Terraza)
Guardar button saves copies per channel
API GET /api/print-channels returns channels with copies field
API PUT /api/print-channels/{id} updates copies field correctly
API POST /api/print/receipt/{bill_id}/send returns copies in response
API GET /api/bills?ncf={ncf} searches bills by NCF for reprint function
critical_code_review_comments: CashRegister.js L472-491: Movement search field with data-testid='movement-search' implemented correctly
CashRegister.js L506-554: Movement list filters using .filter() on description, ref, payment_method, amount
CashRegister.js L928-955: Floating reprint button conditionally rendered when selectedMovement exists
CashRegister.js L290-335: handleReprint extracts NCF from description, fetches bill, sends to print queue
PrinterSettings.jsx L239-250: Copies input field with min=1 max=5 for each channel
PrinterSettings.jsx L254-260: Guardar button calls updateChannel with copies value
server.py L510-513: update_print_channel API stores copies field in MongoDB
server.py L2009-2025: print receipt endpoint includes copies from channel config in response

features_verified.movement_search: PASS - Search field filters movements by NCF, amount, description, payment method
features_verified.floating_reprint_button: PASS - Button appears when sale movement selected, shows Re-imprimir action
features_verified.copies_per_channel: PASS - Copias field visible and functional in Impresion tab for each printer channel
features_verified.api_print_receipt_copies: PASS - /api/print/receipt/{bill_id}/send returns copies count in response
features_verified.api_print_channels_copies: PASS - Print channels API supports reading/updating copies field

context_for_next_testing_agent: 3 new features fully implemented and tested: 1) Movement search in /cash-register page filters by NCF/monto/descripción, 2) Selecting a sale movement shows floating Re-imprimir button at bottom, 3) Printer settings at /settings > Impresion > Configurar Impresora USB/Red shows Copias field (1-5) per channel. Print agent (embedded in server.py) processes copies in loop. Note: /api/reports/valuation-trends still has MOCKED data per original context.

mocked_apis.note: As mentioned by main agent, /api/reports/valuation-trends has mocked data
